title: Field Lines, Repetition, Combination, Structured Fields, and Limits · Language Lens: Structured Fields Rfc9651
summary: A parser stores one value per name, splits every comma, accepts obsolete folding, merges Set-Cookie, and treats all field values as trusted UTF-8 text. Planned artifact: Add and verify the structured fields rfc9651 increment in loss-aware bounded field-section model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Parse RFC 9651 items, lists, dictionaries, parameters, numbers, strings, tokens, bytes, booleans, dates, and display strings strictly when a field opts in.
Parse Connection options and nominate hop-by-hop fields dynamically instead of relying only on a fixed list.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Structured Fields Rfc9651 · Theory Structured Fields Rfc9651
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory protocol team handles case 4209 in a canary edge service advertising HTTP/3 with bounded fallback. Build deterministic Go evidence to preserve repeated field lines and reject sections beyond a bounded policy; preserve this operating constraint: one parser state transition may consume bytes only after its full precondition holds; then truncate one content octet and classify incomplete framing without connection reuse. Browser code models bounded byte and state decisions only.
